meaning: 盖尔森基兴[德意志联邦共和国西部城市]
examples: I know Michael from my time in Gelsenkirchen.
A woman feeds a pig called Felix in a retirement home in Gelsenkirchen, Germany.
Michael Ballack will be missing for the Germans in that friendly fixture on Wednesday in Gelsenkirchen after suffering inflammation to the back of a knee.
But the 31-year-old Sosnowski will now fight for Klitschko's WBC heavyweight belt in Gelsenkirchen on 29 May.
He was sent off during the quarter-final defeat by Portugal in Gelsenkirchen for a stamp on Ricardo Carvalho.
